ci_support_linux_64_hdf51.14.6mpimpich.y:
c_compiler:
- gcc
c_compiler_version:
- '14'
c_stdlib:
- sysroot
c_stdlib_version:
- '2.17'
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
fortran_compiler:
- gfortran
fortran_compiler_version:
- '14'
hdf5:
- 1.14.6
libnetcdf:
- 4.10.0
mpi:
- mpich
mpich:
- '5'
openmpi:
- '5'
target_platform:
- linux-64
zip_keys:
- - c_compiler_version
  - fortran_compiler_version
zlib:
- '1'
name: netcdf-fortran
raw_meta_yaml:
schema_version: 1

context:
  name: netcdf-fortran
  version: "4.6.2"
  build: 5
  # recipe-lint fails if mpi is undefined
  mpi: ${{ mpi or "nompi" }}
  # prioritize nompi via build number
  build_number: ${{ build + 100 if mpi == "nompi" else build }}
  mpi_prefix: ${{ "mpi_" + mpi if mpi != "nompi" else "nompi" }}

package:
  name: ${{ name }}
  version: ${{ version }}

source:
  url: https://github.com/Unidata/netcdf-fortran/archive/v${{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 44cc7b5626b0b054a8503b8fe7c1b0ac4e0a79a69dad792c212454906a9224ca
  patches:
    - 0001-no-clang.patch
    - 0002-manpage-quoting.patch
    - 0003-make-v2compat-cachable.patch
    - if: win
      then: 0004-szip.patch

build:
  number: ${{ build_number }}
  script:
    - if: win
      then: build.bat
    - if: unix
      then: build.sh

  # add build string so packages can depend on
  # mpi or nompi variants explicitly:
  # `netcdf-fortran * mpi_mpich_*` for mpich
  # `netcdf-fortran * mpi_*` for any mpi
  # `netcdf-fortran * nompi_*` for no mpi
  string: ${{ mpi_prefix }}_h${{ hash }}_${{ build_number }}

requirements:
  build:
    # General
    - cmake
    - pkg-config
    - if: mpi == "openmpi" and build_platform != target_platform
      then: ${{ mpi }}
    # Unix
    - if: unix
      then:
        - ${{ compiler('c') }}
        - ${{ stdlib("c") }}
        - ${{ compiler('fortran') }}
        - m4
        - make
    # Win
    - if: win
      then:
        - ${{ compiler('m2w64_c') }}
        - ${{ stdlib("m2w64_c") }}
        - ${{ compiler('m2w64_fortran') }}
        - ninja
  host:
    # need to list hdf5 and libnetcdf twice to get version pinning from
    # conda_build_config and build pinning from ${{ mpi_prefix }}
    - libnetcdf
    - libnetcdf * ${{ mpi_prefix }}_*
    - hdf5
    - hdf5 * ${{ mpi_prefix }}_*
    - zlib
    - if: mpi != "nompi"
      then: ${{ mpi }}
  run:
    - libnetcdf * ${{ mpi_prefix }}_*
    - hdf5 * ${{ mpi_prefix }}_*
    - if: mpi != "nompi"
      then: ${{ mpi }}
  run_exports:
    # https://abi-laboratory.pro/index.php?view=timeline&l=netcdf-fortran
    - ${{ pin_subpackage(name, upper_bound="x.x") }}
    - if: mpi != "nompi"
      then: ${{ name }} * ${{ mpi_prefix }}_*

tests:
  - requirements:
      build:
        - if: not win
          then:
            - ${{ compiler('fortran') }}
          else:
            - ${{ compiler('m2w64_fortran') }}
    script:
      - if: not win
        then:
          - nf-config --version
          - command -v "$(basename "$(nf-config --fc)")"
          - test -f ${PREFIX}/lib/libnetcdff${SHLIB_EXT}
        else:
          - if not exist %PREFIX%\Library\bin\libnetcdff.dll exit 1
          - if not exist %PREFIX%\Library\lib\libnetcdff.lib exit 1
about:
  homepage: https://github.com/Unidata/netcdf-fortran
  license: NetCDF
  license_file: COPYRIGHT
  summary: Unidata NetCDF Fortran Library
  repository: https://github.com/Unidata/netcdf-fortran

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - ocefpaf
    - bekozi
    - xylar
    - zklaus
